meaning: <德> und so weiter等等,以及其他等等(=and so forth)
examples: And the effects of USW to the optic injury of rats.
Roughly 60% of Excellon workers did not select the USW union to represent them.
USW's contract, which expires Sept. 1, gives the union the right to reject any deal that changes control of the company.
In a regulatory filing last week Franklin said it had tendered all of its Esmark shares into the Severstal offer because the USW opposed the Essar bid.
